description: Create and apply an SLD style named 'country_semantic_zoom' to the 'ne:ne_countries' layer in the 'ne' workspace. The style must implement semantic zooming: render countries as polygons (fill #E0E0E0, stroke #333333) when the scale denominator is less than 35,000,000, and as centroid points (Circle, size 6, fill #FF0000) using a geometry transformation (centroid or interiorPoint) when the scale denominator is 35,000,000 or greater. Log in to GeoServer at http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/ (User: admin, Password: Admin123!).
